approval.allowance.name: approval.allowance
approval.allowance.description: Inspect a token allowance: surfaces raw value, unlimited-allowance flag, and coverage of a requested amount.

allowance.description: Current allowance (uint256 string). Defaults to 0 when omitted.

requested_amount.description: Amount being requested by the transaction (uint256 string).

approval.cover_inputs.name: approval.cover_inputs
approval.cover_inputs.description: Whether the token allowance covers the requested input amount.

allowances_cover_inputs.description: Caller-supplied override; takes precedence when present.

requested_amount.description: Amount being requested by the transaction.

clock.now.name: clock.now
clock.now.description: Current Unix timestamp (seconds) from the daemon's clock.

address.sanctions.name: address.sanctions
address.sanctions.description: Whether an address is on the OFAC SDN crypto-address list. Backed by a bundled v1 seed (Tornado Cash pool/router set + well-known designations), to be expanded from the official U.S. Treasury SDN feed.

address.description: Address to screen (bare hex string or an object carrying `address`). Case-insensitive.

address.reputation.name: address.reputation
address.reputation.description: Whether an address is a known malicious / scam / drainer address. Backed by a bundled v1 denylist seed, to be expanded from threat-intel feeds. Unknown well-formed addresses return flagged=false (so they pass).

chain_id.description: EIP-155 chain ID (accepted for forward-compat; v1 seed is mainnet-EVM, keyed on address alone).

address.description: Address to check (bare hex string or an object carrying `address`). Case-insensitive.

token.metadata.name: token.metadata
token.metadata.description: Whether a token is verified/known. Trusts a synced holding with non-user-supplied provenance, else falls back to a bundled allowlist of major mainnet tokens. Unknown tokens return isVerified=false (the intended firing condition).

asset.description: Token to check (address string or AssetRef object carrying `address`).

lending.health_factor.name: lending.health_factor
lending.health_factor.description: Post-action lending health factor. STUB (fail-open / returns nothing): a correct post-action HF needs per-collateral liquidation thresholds + USD prices, which are NOT present in the synced WalletState (only an account-level HF/threshold is synced). Requires extending LendingAccount with per-collateral (token, amount, liqThreshold, priceUsd) rows, OR passing the action's userStateBefore/reserveState as params.

address.activity.name: address.activity
address.activity.description: An address's transaction count and first-seen timestamp. STUB (fail-open / returns nothing): requires an external chain indexer / archive RPC (eth_getTransactionCount + earliest-tx lookup); not derivable from WalletState.

address.similarity.name: address.similarity
address.similarity.description: Address-poisoning check: is the candidate recipient visually similar (shared prefix+suffix) to a known counterparty? STUB (fail-open / returns nothing): WalletState has no known-counterparty / contacts set to compare against. Requires a counterparties set populated from outbound-transfer history during sync.

pool.liquidity.name: pool.liquidity
pool.liquidity.description: A pool's 24h USD volume. STUB (fail-open / returns nothing): pool TVL / volume is external market data (DEX subgraph or on-chain reserves + oracle pricing); not in WalletState.

oracle.effective_rate_bps.name: oracle.effective_rate_bps
oracle.effective_rate_bps.description: Effective rate of a swap vs the oracle's mid-market price, expressed in basis points (negative = unfavourable).

oracle.usd_value.name: oracle.usd_value
oracle.usd_value.description: Convert a token amount to its USD valuation via a price oracle.

source.description: Which price source to query. `coingecko` is HTTP-based and works out of the box; `chainlink` reads on-chain feeds and needs POLICY_RPC_CHAIN_RPCS configured per chain.

portfolio.balance.name: portfolio.balance
portfolio.balance.description: Wallet balance of a specific token.

portfolio.input_fraction_bps.name: portfolio.input_fraction_bps
portfolio.input_fraction_bps.description: Fraction of the wallet's portfolio (denominated in the input asset) the transaction is spending, in basis points.

pasu.evaluate_v3.name: pasu.evaluate_v3
pasu.evaluate_v3.description: Phase 5D mock — echo (actions, eval_context, wallet_id) back as policyRequest.actions with empty state_before / deltas / state_after. Real implementation arrives in Phase 6 (reducer + state sync).

wallet_id.description: WalletId (address + chains). Carried verbatim by the mock; Phase 6 will key state persistence off this.

actions.description: List of caller-built Actions (typed PDF FSM ActionBody plus ActionMeta). The mock echoes these into policyRequest.actions.

stat_window.snapshot.name: stat_window.snapshot
stat_window.snapshot.description: Rolling-window snapshot of recent on-chain activity for the wallet.

stat_window.swap_stats.name: stat_window.swap_stats
stat_window.swap_stats.description: Per-action stats over a sliding 24h window (volume + count).
